name: William Goldstein
abstract: William Goldstein (born February 25, 1942) is an American composer, recording artist, arts philosopher and improvisational pianist. Goldstein has received three Emmy nominations and one Grammy nomination for his scores Fame, Hello Again, and Shocker.

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: I just did an album of improvisations with William Goldstein who is a film composer... And he and I improvised an album which just came out a few months ago.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]
